concerns.text: FR-001a (switch to verified fallback source if primary fails) is not explicitly covered by a task. T013 mentions validating subreddits but does not include the logic to switch sources or abort if no verified multi-subreddit source is available, as required by FR-001a and FR-014.

FR-001 (abort if <4,000 comments per group) is partially covered by T016, but T016 only mentions aborting if <4,000 comments per group OR missing subreddits. It does not explicitly cover the case where the dataset is exhausted before reaching TARGET_N=10,000, which is also a requirement of FR-001.

FR-010a (aggregation hierarchy for insufficient strata: thematic -> thread type -> global) is not explicitly covered by a task. T023 mentions stratified sampling and merge hierarchy FR-010a, but does not detail the specific merge steps or the global pool fallback required by FR-010a.

FR-011a (verify gold_standard.csv has >=3 raters and reject if not) is not explicitly covered by a task. T023 mentions verifying >=3 raters, but does not include the logic to reject files that do not meet this criterion and log an error, as required by FR-011a.

FR-005a (sensitivity analysis with specific thresholds 0.01, 0.05, 0.10 and three model variants) is not explicitly covered by a task. T030 mentions running bootstrap resampling, model variants, and alternative random effects, but does not specify the exact thresholds or the three specific model variants required by FR-005a.

FR-005b (singular fit fallback: re-fit without user_id if variance <= 0.01) is not explicitly covered by a task. T029 mentions including singular fit check and fallback, but does not specify the exact variance threshold (<=0.01) or the action to re-fit without user_id, as required by FR-005b.

SC-008 (neg_score correlation with VADER neg on sample, Pearson r >= 0.9) is not explicitly covered by a task. T040 mentions validating neg_score correlation with VADER neg, but does not specify the exact correlation threshold (Pearson r >= 0.9) or the sample size (100 comments) required by SC-008.

T009 (power analysis script) is placed in Phase 2 (Foundational) alongside config and logging, but FR-013 requires the power analysis to be conducted prior to data collection. This placement may allow data ingestion (T013) to proceed before the power analysis is completed, potentially violating FR-013.
